title: Flaky Indian Apple Crumble
description: This floral and flaky Indian (Punjabi) dish combines apple cider vinegar for a unique flavor twist, caramelized apples, and a low-sodium-friendly crumb topping.

ingredients.name: apple cider vinegar
ingredients.notes: Replace with regular apple juice for a lighter version

ingredients.name: sugar
ingredients.notes: Use 2% less sugar to be low-sodium-friendly

instructions: In a large bowl, mix grated apples with apple cider vinegar, sugar, and cinnamon. Mix well.
Add flour, baking powder, salt, and melted butter into the apple mixture. Mix until crumbly but still holds together.
Spread the apple mixture evenly onto a lined baking sheet or in a pie dish. Sprinkle pitted prunes on top of the crust.
Bake for 30-40 minutes or until golden brown and the filling is set. Let it cool slightly before serving with vanilla ice cream.
